arts.sum: Lazio are preparing to host Empoli at the Stadio Olimpico in Rome in what will be their final fixture before the October international break. The match kicks off on Sunday, 15:00 local time. arts.ttl: Serie A | Lazio v Empoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A action resumes this weekend, Lazio welcomes Empoli to the Stadio Olimpico for an intriguing Sunday afternoon clash. Both teams enter the match level on 10 points, sitting just outside the top five in the league table. Lazio comes into this fixture riding a wave of momentum, having won their last three matches across all competitions. Most recently, they dismantled Nice 4-1 in the Europa League, following a thrilling 3-2 victory over Torino in Serie A last weekend. Manager Marco Baroni seems to have found the right formula after a somewhat inconsistent start to the domestic campaign. arts.sum: Lazio are once again working on extending the contract of their second-choice goalkeeper Christos Mandas.
